title: Dactylorhiza × hepburnii
taxonomy: Dactylorhiza × hepburnii is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza fuchsii and Dactylorhiza maculata. This hybrid orchid is native to the United Kingdom and Ireland. As it's a hybrid, it is not assigned a specific genus classification, but rather considered a member of the Dactylorhiza genus. Dactylorhiza × hepburnii is often found in wet meadows and grasslands. The classification of Dactylorhiza × hepburnii is significant for orchid enthusiasts and botanists studying plant hybridization.
